summary: Comprehensive testing of BidBlitz new features: BIETEN button fix, Auction of the Day, User Statistics, Social Sharing, and Admin AOTD setting. All features working correctly.

bieten_button_fix.evidence: BIETEN button on homepage works correctly. API endpoint /api/auctions/{id}/bid is called. Toast notification 'Gebot platziert!' shown on successful bid.

auction_of_the_day.evidence: AOTD section displays on homepage with golden gradient styling, crown icon (👑), 'Auktion des Tages' title, product name, price, timer, and 'JETZT BIETEN' button.

aotd_api_endpoints.evidence: GET /api/auction-of-the-day returns 200 with auction data. POST /api/admin/auction-of-the-day/{id} requires admin auth and sets AOTD correctly.

user_statistics_page.evidence: /stats page loads with Level section (crown icon), Gebote insgesamt, Gewonnene Auktionen, Gewinnrate, Login-Streak, Verfügbare Gebote, Mitglied seit, Achievements section, and Letzte Aktivitäten.

social_sharing.evidence: Share button on auction detail page opens dropdown with 6 options: WhatsApp, Telegram, Facebook, Twitter/X, E-Mail, and Link kopieren.

dashboard_statistiken_button.evidence: Dashboard has 'Statistiken' button linking to /stats page, visible in top right area next to Profil.

admin_aotd_crown_button.evidence: Admin panel Auctions tab has Crown button (Crown icon) for each auction to set as Auction of the Day. Function handleSetAuctionOfTheDay at line 492-503 in Admin.js.

authentication.evidence: Customer login (kunde@bidblitz.de / Kunde123!) and Admin login (admin@bidblitz.de / Admin123!) both work correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: BIETEN button correctly calls /api/auctions/{id}/bid endpoint (fixed from /api/auctions/place-bid)
AuctionOfTheDay component in Auctions.js (line 10-85) has proper golden gradient styling and crown icon
UserStats.js page shows Level, Bids, Won Auctions, Win Rate, Login Streak as requested
Social sharing in AuctionDetail.js (line 38-89) supports WhatsApp, Telegram, Facebook, Twitter, Email, Copy Link
Admin.js handleSetAuctionOfTheDay function (line 492-503) correctly sets AOTD via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) BIETEN button fixed - uses correct /api/auctions/{id}/bid endpoint, 2) Auction of the Day displays on homepage with golden styling and crown icon, 3) User Statistics page at /stats shows Level, Bids, Won Auctions, Win Rate, Login Streak, 4) Social Sharing on auction detail page has 6 platforms (WhatsApp, Telegram, Facebook, Twitter, Email, Copy Link), 5) Dashboard has Statistiken button linking to /stats, 6) Admin can set AOTD via Crown button in auction management. Live-Chat is placeholder only (Tawk.to with IHRE_PROPERTY_ID placeholder).
